title: Graph Edge Declaration
description: Schema for a single edge as declared in a file header. Used by the graph engine during crawl.

source.description: File path of the declaring file, relative to workspace root.

type.description: Semantic relationship from source to target.

target.description: File path of the referenced file, relative to workspace root.

status.description: Set by graph engine during resolution. valid = target exists. broken = target not found.

note.description: Optional human-readable note explaining the relationship. Max 120 characters.
